Petition For Preliminary Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Frank Wing.

The Court stated that the petition is now filed with a hearing date of September 7, 2016 and that it had been on for status. Ms. Ng reported that she had received the signature pages on Monday and filed on that date. The status on closing the estate is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Continued To Aug-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for (co-administrators) Frank Wing & Leslie Wing.

The Court stated that we are looking for a petition for final distribution. Ms. Ng stated that she is trying to file a petition for preliminary distribution, that it is a large estate with lots of issues, that the ownership interest in one of the properties is increasing and that they will be selling one property. The status on close of estate was continued to August 3, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that a petition will be on file.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
